description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events for specific file paths, ignoring the gh-pages branch. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of three jobs: linux, windows, and tipi-build-linux. The linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for compiler, linker, and build type. The windows job runs on windows-2022 with a matrix strategy for build type. The tipi-build-linux job runs on ubuntu-latest in a tipi build container, testing project builds and dependency resolution.
